title: Grey Ombre Glaze Tea Light Essential Oil Burner | Ceramic Wax Melt Burner Fragrance Oil Burner Diffuser | Round Tealight Holder Oil Burner
features: OIL BURNER | Elevate your home and indulge in a touch of luxury with our sleek, black stoneware burner. Its captivating ombre design, transitioning gracefully from shades of grey and blue to a matte black base, creating a unique and striking appearance

ROOM DIFFUSER | Set the mood and infuse your space with delightful scents. Choose your preferred scented oils, wax melts, or granules, place a tea light candle underneath, and let the sweet aromas envelop you
WAX MELT BURNER | Relax, rejuvenate, and revitalise with this stylish oil burner. It's the ideal companion for a soothing bath at the end of a long day
CERAMIC TEALIGHT HOLDER | Simple and elegant, this Ombre-toned essential oil burner also doubles as a delightful home accessory. It's a thoughtful gift, perfect for a new home or someone special

AROMA LAMP | The cut-out design casts a captivating glow while filling your space with enchanting aromas. This fragrance burner stands 10.5cm high and spans 8.5cm across, making it a standout piece in any room
